name: Networking Toolbox
description: The all-in-one offline-first networking toolbox for sysadmins
compose:
name: slashnode-networkingtoolbox
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/lissy93/networking-toolbox:1.6.0
    container_name: networkingtoolbox
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: '3000'
      HOST: 0.0.0.0
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3686:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
